use_cases: Contact page forms for customer inquiries and support requests
Lead capture forms on landing pages
Newsletter subscription forms with basic contact info
General inquiry forms for websites and applications
ai_summary: A clean contact form component featuring full name and email input fields with pill-shaped borders, indigo accent colors, and subtle focus ring animations. The form includes an icon prefix in each input and is designed with responsive, centered layout suitable for contact pages, landing pages, or support sections across various web applications.
